CVE-2025-23386.title: A Incorrect Default Permissions vulnerability in the openSUSE Tum ...
CVE-2025-23386.description: A Incorrect Default Permissions vulnerability in the openSUSE Tumbleweed package gerbera allows the service user gerbera to escalate to root.,This issue affects gerbera on openSUSE Tumbleweed before 2.5.0-1.1.
